description: The unique identifier for a specific hotel property.
name: property_code

description: The name of the hotel property.
name: property_name

description: The date of the guest's stay.
name: stay_date

description: The market segment to which the booking belongs.
name: segment

description: The date when the data snapshot was taken.
name: snapshot_date

description: The number of rooms on the books for a given stay date.
name: rooms_otb

description: The number of rooms on the books for the same stay date last year.
name: rooms_stly

description: The number of rooms on the books for the same stay date two years ago.
name: rooms_st2y

description: The actual number of rooms occupied for the same stay date last year.
name: rooms_ly_actual

description: The revenue on the books for a given stay date.
name: rev_otb

description: The revenue on the books for the same stay date last year.
name: rev_stly

description: The revenue on the books for the same stay date two years ago.
name: rev_st2y

description: The actual revenue generated for the same stay date last year.
name: rev_ly_actual

description: The forecasted number of rooms.
name: rooms_forecast

description: The forecasted revenue.
name: rev_forecast

description: The rooms forecast from the revenue management system.
name: rms_rooms_forecast

description: The revenue forecast from the revenue management system.
name: rms_rev_forecast

description: The budgeted number of rooms.
name: rooms_budget

description: The budgeted revenue.
name: rev_budget

description: The number of cancelled rooms.
name: cancelled_rooms

description: The actual number of cancelled rooms for the same period last year.
name: cancelled_rooms_ly_actual

description: The number of no-show rooms.
name: noshow_rooms

description: The actual number of no-show rooms for the same period last year.
name: noshow_rooms_ly_actual

description: The unique code for the market segment.
name: segment_code

description: The broader group to which the market segment belongs.
name: segment_group

description: The unique code for the market segment group.
name: segment_group_code

description: The financial segment classification.
name: finance_segment

description: The sorting order for the market segment.
name: segment_sort
